task_completion.description: Navigate to the dropdown editor for the 'industry_dom' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the CRM's admin or studio interface with the dropdown editor open, specifically indicating that 'industry_dom' is being edited.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Renewable Energy' item to the 'industry_dom' dropdown list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown list items for 'industry_dom' showing a new entry with the Item Name (or Key) as 'Renewable_Energy' and the Display Label as 'Renewable Energy'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the dropdown editor for the 'lead_source_dom' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing the dropdown editor interface specifically indicating that 'lead_source_dom' is being edited.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Webinar' item to the 'lead_source_dom' dropdown list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dropdown list items for 'lead_source_dom' showing a new entry with the Item Name (or Key) as 'Webinar' and the Display Label as 'Webinar'.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Create Account' form is visible in the CRM interface, showing fields for Account Name, Industry, etc.

task_completion.description: Create and save the account 'SolarTech Solutions' with the industry set to 'Renewable Energy'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view or success screen of the newly created account showing the Account Name as 'SolarTech Solutions' and the Industry field displaying 'Renewable Energy'.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the CRM application, rather than terminal windows executing database queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: The dropdown modifications were made in the actual CRM admin/studio interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dropdown editor screens match the standard CRM layout and are not mocked up in a text editor or separate HTML file.

integrity.description: The account was created using the actual CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The account creation and detail screens show the full CRM navigation menus and layout, confirming genuine software interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected account name is 'SolarTech Solutions'. The expected new industry key in the dropdown is 'Renewable_Energy' (display label 'Renewable Energy'). The expected lead source key is 'Webinar' (display label 'Webinar').
